nasb.text: So Moses went out and told the people the words of the Lord. Also, he gathered seventy men of the elders of the people, and stationed them around the tent.

esv.text: So Moses went out and told the people the words of the Lord. And he gathered seventy men of the elders of the people and placed them around the tent.

cnv.text: 於是摩西出來，把耶和華的話告訴人民，又從民間的長老中召聚了七十個人來，使他們站在會幕的周圍。

ccb.text: 摩西就出去把耶和华的话转告民众，又选了七十位长老，叫他们站在会幕周围。
